name: Dave Inc./DE
business: Dave Inc. is a neobank providing a mobile-first financial services platform designed to help Americans manage their money more effectively. The company generates revenue through three primary business activities: ExtraCash (short-term credit), Dave Checking (digital banking account), and subscription-based personal financial management tools. It serves members underserved by traditional financial institutions.
sellsTo: members underserved by traditional financial institutions

exposures.sentence: The Company is a neobank providing a mobile-first financial services platform designed to help Americans manage their money more effectively.

The Company's proprietary AI-powered underwriting engine, CashAI, analyzes checking account transaction data in real-time to determine eligibility and credit approval amounts without requiring FICO scores or credit bureau data.

catalysts.event: Transition of ExtraCash receivables to off-balance sheet structure substantially finalized
catalysts.sentence: under our Program Agreement with Coastal, we expect to transition ExtraCash receivables to an off-balance sheet structure as existing Members migrate to Coastal, which we anticipate will be substantially finalized by the end of 2026.
